title: arachnorchis necrophylla
intro: Arachnorchis necrophylla, also known as the Corpse Flower Orchid, is a type of orchid native to Western Australia, characterized by its unique appearance and strong, unpleasant odor. The plant has been used in traditional Aboriginal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming the plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating pain. Arachnorchis necrophylla is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, but caution should be exercised due to its potent properties and potential side effects.
